---
title: "Muriel Caroline Papillon"
---

## Muriel Caroline Papillon

**Dates:** (b.1866)

### Description

goddaughter of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of Philip Oxenden Papillon and Emily Caroline Garnier, she married (1897) the Rev. H. C. Lenox Tindall. [His obituary, <i>The Times</i> (14 June 1940) states that she survived him]

### Letters

- Letter from [probably late January ?1870s]
- Letter from Jan 8th [or perhaps 6th, 1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
